# rubrik_user (List Resource)

The `rubrik_user` list resource lists local users in RSC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "rubrik_user" "all" {
  provider = rubrik
}

list "rubrik_user" "by_email" {
  provider = rubrik

  config {
    email = "auditor@example.org"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) Filter users by email. Matches users whose email contains the given value (case-insensitive).
